import { useState } from 'react' import '../styles/contact.css' const CONTACT_INFO = [ { icon: '📧', label: 'Email', value: 'yourname@email.com', href: 'mailto:yourname@email.com' }, { icon: '📍', label: 'Location', value: 'City, Country', href: '#' }, { icon: '💼', label: 'LinkedIn', value: 'linkedin.com/in/yourname', href: 'https://linkedin.com/in/yourname' }, { icon: '🐙', label: 'GitHub', value: 'github.com/yourusername', href: 'https://github.com/yourusername' }, ] const INIT = { name: '', email: '', subject: '', message: '' } const Contact = () => { const [form, setForm] = useState(INIT) const [status, setStatus] = useState('') // 'success' | 'error' | '' const handleChange = e => setForm(prev => ({ ...prev, [e.target.name]: e.target.value })) const handleSubmit = e => { e.preventDefault() /* TODO (Backend phase): const res = await fetch('/api/contact', { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify(form), }) */ setStatus('success') setForm(INIT) setTimeout(() => setStatus(''), 5000) } return (
